servinfosub.title: Arm
servinfosub.ptxt: Check body of suspension arm (1) for damage and deterioration. Replace suspension arm if check result is not OK.

servinfosub.title: Bushing
servinfosub.ptxt: Check suspension arm front bushing (2) for damage, wear and deterioration. Replace bushing if check result is not OK.
Check suspension arm rear bushing (3) for damage, wear and deterioration. Replace suspension arm assembly if check result is not OK.

item.ptxt: Check that suspension arm joint (1) is not stuck, is not damaged and does not have play. Replace suspension arm assembly if check result is not OK.
Check suspension arm joint dust cover (2) for cracks and damage. Replace suspension arm assembly if check result is not OK.

attention3.ptxt: Suspension arm and arm joint cannot be separated.
